message:
fix(providers): improve OpenClaw detection and Pi-Agent filename/metadata handling

OpenClaw: Refine session directory detection to distinguish between the
sessions directory itself existing vs only its parent directory existing,
producing more accurate evidence strings during provider detection.

Pi-Agent: Ensure session filenames always contain an underscore so that
`owns_session` can reliably identify them. Incoming session IDs that lack
an underscore now get a timestamp prefix. Also fix the JSONL header's
"provider" field to read from session metadata rather than falling back
to a hardcoded "unknown" — now correctly uses the provider_slug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
